headline: 3 Reasons MMM is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Over the past six months, 3M’s stock price fell to $155. Shareholders have lost 6.4% of their capital, which is disappointing considering the S&P 500 has climbed by 7.5%. This might have investors contemplating their next move.
